public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as archive auditor.
appearance: Practical layers, inspection tools, and a habit of carrying evidence or notes keep inquiry visibly close at hand.
manner: Treats certainty as something earned late, not something to perform early. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a archive auditor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of archive auditor in and around Union Sanction Board, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Union Sanction Board workable through the obligations of archive auditor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must move carefully enough to stay accurate and quickly enough not to lose the trail entirely. Around Union Sanction Board, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of archive auditor visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Sena Brokerwell can share a strong lead if the party retrieves testimony, material proof, or a missing intermediary.
Sena Brokerwell needs discreet assistance following contradictory evidence, frightened witnesses, or a lead too politically awkward to pursue openly in Union Sanction Board.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Questioning silence, inspection habits, and careful note-taking make Sena Brokerwell look like inquiry before accusation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Union Sanction Board: inquiry rooms, witness routes, guarded evidence sites, or contested scenes
who_seeks_them_out: those needing a problem solved quietly
